testcase.name: testDateSelection
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.ElementClickInterceptedException: element click intercepted: Element <button type="button" data-testid="valid-calendar-day-2026-04-25" tabindex="1" class="YhLeVN ujt4w6 dxMQD1">...</button> is not clickable at point (590, 532).
